div.p: Clark's Rule: Only advertise window if:
Nagle's Rule: Send immediately if ANY:

ol.li: Loop: many tiny segments Result: High overhead, poor throughput 10 bytes data + 40 bytes headers = 25% efficiency

ul.li: Wait until significant space opens Sender (Nagle):
Send when ACK arrives or buffer full Result: Fewer, larger segments 1460 bytes data + 40 bytes headers = 97% efficiency
MSS (Maximum Segment Size): Typically 1460 bytes on Ethernet
